name: Sweet and Sour Scampi
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by placing chopped scallion in a saucepan. Add white wine and vinegar; season well with pepper. Bring to boil and cook for 3 minutes over medium heat.
2. Add sugar, orange juice, ginger, pineapple, and chicken stock; mix well. Bring to a boil again.
3. Mix cornstarch with cold water; stir into sauce and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Correct seasoning and simmer over very low heat.
5. Cook shrimp in 2 batches to avoid overcrowding the pan. Heat butter in a large frying pan. Add shrimp, fennel seed, and lemon juice; season well. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Serve shrimp with sauce over rice.
